about.title: Making Housing <accessible>Accessible</accessible> for All Nigerians
about.description: We are on a mission to solve one of Nigeria's challenges: the burden of annual rent payments. Through innovative financing solutions, we are helping thousands of Nigerians find and afford their dream homes.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: In 2021, our founders experienced firsthand the struggle of paying annual rent in Lagos. Despite having good jobs and steady income, coming up with millions of naira upfront felt impossible.
story.p2: They realized millions of Nigerians face the same challenge every year. The traditional rental system was broken - landlords wanted their money upfront, but tenants could not always provide it.
story.p3: Shelterflex was born to bridge this gap. We pay landlords upfront while allowing tenants to spread their payments over months. It is a win-win that is transforming how Nigerians rent homes.
story.quote: We believe everyone deserves a place to call home, regardless of their ability to pay upfront.

peopleFirst.title: People First
peopleFirst.description: We believe everyone deserves a home. Our solutions are designed to make housing accessible to all Nigerians.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: No hidden fees, no surprises. We believe in clear, honest communication with our customers.

empathy.title: Empathy
empathy.description: We understand the challenges of renting in Nigeria. Our team has lived these experiences.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We are committed to providing the best possible experience for both tenants and landlords.

m2021.title: Founded
m2021.description: Shelterflex was born from a simple idea: make renting easier.

m2022.title: First 1,000 Tenants
m2022.description: Helped our first thousand Nigerians access housing.

m2024.title: 10,000+ Tenants
m2024.description: Reached a major milestone in impact.

cta.title: Ready to Join the Shelterflex Family?
cta.description: Whether you are a tenant looking for flexible payments or a landlord wanting guaranteed income, we have got you covered.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

form.title: Send us a Message
form.successDescription: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.failedDescription: Please fix the errors below and try again.
form.failedGeneric: Failed to send message. Please try again.

info.title: Contact Information
info.responseTimeDesc: We typically respond within 24 hours during business days. For urgent matters, please call us directly.
info.needHelpDesc: Check our FAQ or knowledge base for instant answers to common questions.
